use_cases: User authentication and login to SaaS applications
Password visibility toggle for improved UX
Testimonial display to build trust during sign-in
Password reset and account creation flows
ai_summary: A polished sign-in authentication page featuring glass-morphism styling with frosted glass input wrappers, gradient accents in violet tones, and password visibility toggle functionality. Includes social login options (Google), testimonial cards with subtle scroll animations, and links for password reset and account creation. Designed for desktop and mobile platforms with a modern, premium aesthetic suitable for SaaS and e-commerce applications.
